issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases, limiting robustness.
The skill lacks any realistic examples demonstrating its usage.

scenarios.name: Splitting a monolithic UserService refactor RFC
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced a five-step macro-plan with no interview, exploration, or structured template; treatment interviewed the user, scanned the repo, surfaced alternatives, listed tiny Fowler-style commits, and emitted a GitHub issue body with all six required sections.

scenarios.name: Mongoose to Prisma migration RFC
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gave a big-bang switch list with no coexistence plan or template; treatment interviewed, checked test coverage, presented coexistence alternatives, planned a per-model wrapper migration that stays green every commit, and wrote the full RFC issue body.
